mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND password = #{password}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (user_id, username, password, dept_code, post_code, user_seq, role, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{password}, #{deptCode}, #{postCode}, #{userSeq}, #{role}, '0')
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(user_seq AS SIGNED)), 0) FROM sys_user WHERE dept_code = #{deptCode} AND post_code = #{postCode}
SELECT * FROM sys_user ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE role = #{role} AND status = '0'
